message:
feat(fcp-core): add fork detection and resolution infrastructure

Expand connector_state.rs with comprehensive fork handling (585+ lines):

StateForkDetectionResult enum:
- NoFork { head, seq }: Single consistent state head
- ForkDetected(ForkEvent): Competing state branches detected

ForkEvent enhancements:
- new() constructor with full fork metadata
- resolve_by_lease(): Determine winner by lease sequence number
- Derive PartialEq, Eq for testing

ForkResolution strategy validation:
- is_valid_for(): Check strategy compatibility with state model
- ChooseByLease: Valid for singleton-writer models
- ManualResolution: Always valid
- CrdtMerge: Valid for CRDT-based models

This provides the foundation for detecting and resolving state
divergence in distributed connector deployments, enabling
graceful recovery from network partitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
